document.source_title: End of an era: VB–G RAM G to replace MGNREGA on July 1 as Centre notifies rollout

claims.claim_text: The VB–G RAM G Act 2025 will repeal the MGNREGA 2005.

claims.claim_text: The VB–G RAM G Act will become effective on July 1, 2026.
